TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Ilausan, title = Ilausan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ilausan} }

S.FORM: Ilausan Itiniay i Xinyi Cen no Nantou ko Ilausan a niyaro', 110 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 392 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 68% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 266 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 32% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 126 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 67%, Tayal 1%, Puyuma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: iɾao~u~usan itiniaj i xinji ʦən no~u nanto~uo~u~u ko~u iɾao~u~usan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, tajaɾ *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Ilausan Itiniay i Xinyi Cen no Nantou ko Ilausan a niyaro', 110 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 392 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 68% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 266 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 32% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 126 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 67%, Tayal 1%, Puyuma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: iɾao~u~usan itiniaj i xinji ʦən no~u nanto~uo~u~u ko~u iɾao~u~usan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, tajaɾ *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
